disclosure: The bystander-effect reference describes a well-documented general behavioral pattern in shared responsibility settings, not a specific client result.

claims.text: CRM pipelines and task automation give a team a single clear owner for each lead so nothing falls through
Auto-reassigning unclaimed leads after a set window counters the bystander effect that happens when a lead alert reaches multiple reps at once

disclosure: Figures reflect widely cited lead-response-time research (e.g., Lead Response Management / InsideSales studies) rather than Black Arrow's own client data.

claims.text: The businesses winning jobs are the fastest to respond, not necessarily the best at the trade
Under 20% of businesses respond to a new lead within an hour
Responding within 5 minutes nearly doubles the close rate
